channel.title: github_trending
channel.description: Latest posts from https://github.com/trending. follow.is: None

item.title: addyosmani /agent-skills | Shell | N/A
item.description: Production-grade engineering skills for AI coding agents.

item.title: francescopace /espectre | Python | N/A
item.description: 🛜 ESPectre 👻 - Motion detection system based on Wi-Fi spectre analysis (CSI), with Home Assistant integration.

item.title: santifer /career-ops | JavaScript | N/A
item.description: AI-powered job search system built on Claude Code. 14 skill modes, Go dashboard, PDF generation, batch processing.

item.title: phuryn /pm-skills | N/A | N/A
item.description: PM Skills Marketplace: 100+ agentic skills, commands, and plugins — from discovery to strategy, execution, launch, and growth.

item.title: x1xhlol /system-prompts-and-models-of-ai-tools | N/A | N/A
item.description: FULL Augment Code, Claude Code, Cluely, CodeBuddy, Comet, Cursor, Devin AI, Junie, Kiro, Leap.new, Lovable, Manus, NotionAI, Orchids.app, Perplexity, Poke, Qoder, Replit, Same.dev, Trae, Traycer AI, VSCode Agent, Warp.dev, Windsurf, Xcode, Z.ai Code, Dia & v0. (And other Open Sourced) System Prompts, Internal Tools & AI Models

item.title: Andyyyy64 /whichllm | Python | N/A
item.description: Find the local LLM that actually runs and performs best on your hardware. Ranked by real, recency-aware benchmarks, not parameter count. One command, run it instantly.

item.title: aaif-goose /goose | Rust | N/A
item.description: an open source, extensible AI agent that goes beyond code suggestions - install, execute, edit, and test with any LLM

item.title: refactoringhq /tolaria | TypeScript | N/A
item.description: Desktop app to manage markdown knowledge bases

item.title: roboflow /supervision | Python | N/A
item.description: We write your reusable computer vision tools. 💜

item.title: RyanCodrai /turbovec | Python | N/A
item.description: A vector index built on TurboQuant, written in Rust with Python bindings

item.title: mvanhorn /last30days-skill | Python | N/A
item.description: AI agent skill that researches any topic across Reddit, X, YouTube, HN, Polymarket, and the web - then synthesizes a grounded summary
